creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Thanks!

Do the late-breaking news sections need a cleanup? 

<https://www.freebsd.org/releases/13.0R/errata/#late-news> for example, 

> [2021-04-05] A very late issue was discovered in the /usr/bin/dc program. …

– there was the subsequent 'dc update' <https://www.freebsd.org/security/advisories/FreeBSD-EN-21:16.bc.asc>
